// EnableCustomWeenies: Master toggle for runtime weenie injection. When true, JSON files under Content/Weenies/*.json are loaded at Start() and Harmony-served via WorldDatabaseWithEntityCache.GetCachedWeenie. When false, all custom WCIDs fall through to the vanilla DB lookup (so old SQL-applied rows still work, but JSON edits are ignored).
// LogWeenieRegistrySummary: Log a one-line summary at Start() listing which custom WCIDs were registered (and any JSON load errors). Recommended: keep on while iterating, off once stable.
// LogWeenieRegistryVerbose: Log every property override applied to each custom WCID. Noisy; debugging only.
